name: Raw Fish Salad (Japanese Sashimi)
recipeIngredient: or other fresh fish of your choice
Water or salt for cleaning the fish
Bowl of very fresh salad greens
recipeInstructions: In this popular dish, the Japanese enjoy eating their fish completely raw. The fish is cut into slivers about 1/4 inch thick and dipped into a mixture of fresh chopped gingerroot, grated horseradish, and mustard sauce. Dishes of very fresh salad greens are provided for mixing with the fish. If the fish is very fresh, the presentation is colorful and appetizing, and the first bite is accompanied by crisp greens, one may discover that raw fish can be delicious without cooking.
